Hook count actually INCREASED from 74 to 75 — R#331 added 35-r-session-posthook_R.sh but old hooks (15-r-commit-gate.sh, 26-brainstorm-compliance_R.sh, 18-r-impact-track.sh) not deleted. a211-2.metric_after: Thread count trend: 3→2→2→1→2. s1859 = 2 threads, 4 platforms. E cost $1.38 last-5 (under $1.80). Engagement depth recovering.

active.title: Reduce hook system complexity

critical_issues.description: d074 hook consolidation stalled for 3rd consecutive audit. 67.5% of timeline elapsed with 0 hooks deleted. Hook count INCREASED 74→75. wq-899 pending 12 sessions. B sessions systematically deprioritize d074 deletion work in favor of bug fixes and feature items. At current pace, d074 will be the first self-directive to fully miss its deadline with zero deliverable execution.
critical_issues.actionability: HIGH — wq-899 and wq-904 exist and are fully specified. Only needs B session to execute.
critical_issues.action: Force-prioritize wq-899 in the NEXT B session. Then wq-904 in the following B session. If both execute, hook count drops 75→63 — partial but meaningful.

recommended_actions.description: d074 hook deletion MUST happen in next 2 B sessions. 3 consecutive audits (A#209, A#210, A#211, A#212) have flagged this with escalating urgency. wq-899 (delete 7 A pre-hooks) has been pending 12 sessions. wq-904 (delete 5 R hooks) pending 2 sessions. B sessions keep consuming lower-priority items instead. Hook count has regressed from 74→75.
recommended_actions.action: Create explicit priority override: wq-899 MUST be the sole primary task of the very next B session. wq-904 MUST be the sole primary task of the B session after that. No other queue items should be consumed until these two are done. Failure to execute by s1865 should trigger d074 partial-close with 0/4 deliverables.
